scaled_oracle_cases.description: Combined scaled test for reversed x coordinates and label name robustness, including original seed flow.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Check whether the solution jointly satisfies multiple interacting semantic changes: centering label when start_x > end_x, and using the provided label_name without hardcoding.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: Label x-coordinate must equal (min(start_x,end_x) + max(start_x,end_x))/2. The drawn label's text must equal the label_name passed to the method.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Solution handles single axis changes but not combined semantics.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
Chromosome._draw_label = bc_chromosome_draw_label

dwg = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom.start_x_position = 50
chrom.end_x_position   = 350
chrom.start_y_position = 20
chrom.title_size       = 14
chrom._draw_label(dwg, 'Chromosome 1')
dwg.save(formats=['svg'], outDir='.', fnRoot='test_chrom_label')
print('SVG saved as test_chrom_label.svg')

dwg2 = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom2 = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom2.start_x_position = 350
chrom2.end_x_position = 50
chrom2.start_y_position = 20
chrom2.title_size = 14
chrom2._draw_label(dwg2, 'Chromosome 1')
label = dwg2.contents[0]
assert label.x == 200.0, f"Expected x=200, got {label.x}"
assert label.y == 20 + 0.1 * inch, f"Expected y={20+0.1*inch}, got {label.y}"
print('Passed reversed coordinate test')

dwg3 = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom3 = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom3.start_x_position = 50
chrom3.end_x_position = 350
chrom3.start_y_position = 20
chrom3.title_size = 14
chrom3._draw_label(dwg3, 'Chr2')
label3 = dwg3.contents[0]
assert label3.text == 'Chr2', f"Expected text='Chr2', got {label3.text}"
dwg4 = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom4 = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom4.start_x_position = 50
chrom4.end_x_position = 350
chrom4.start_y_position = 20
chrom4.title_size = 14
chrom4._draw_label(dwg4, '123')
label4 = dwg4.contents[0]
assert label4.text == '123'
dwg5 = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom5 = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom5.start_x_position = 50
chrom5.end_x_position = 350
chrom5.start_y_position = 20
chrom5.title_size = 14
chrom5._draw_label(dwg5, '')
label5 = dwg5.contents[0]
assert label5.text == ''
dwg6 = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom6 = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom6.start_x_position = 50
chrom6.end_x_position = 350
chrom6.start_y_position = 20
chrom6.title_size = 14
chrom6._draw_label(dwg6, 'name with spaces')
label6 = dwg6.contents[0]
assert label6.text == 'name with spaces'
print('Passed label name robustness test')
result = None
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a hidden test with reversed x coordinates.
Scaled executable cases must include hidden tests with multiple label name variants.
